info.title: PEA API
info.description: The API of PEA (Personal Email Archive). All endpoints are prefixed with `/api/v1` (also served at `/v1`) and require no authentication, the app is single-user and the API is served in-process by the desktop app (`pea://`). To call it over HTTP for scripting or debugging, run the standalone engine: `pea-engine --data-dir ~/.local/share/pea --port 47200` (binds to 127.0.0.1 only).

Unauthorized.description: Authentication is required or the token is invalid/expired.

Forbidden.description: The authenticated user is not allowed to perform this action.

NotFound.description: The requested resource was not found.

InternalServerError.description: An unexpected error occurred on the server.

key.description: Partial/masked key, the raw value is only available at creation time.

SafeIngestionSource.description: An ingestion source with sensitive credential fields removed.

providerConfig.description: Provider-specific configuration. See the ingestion source guides for the required fields per provider.

storageHashSha256.description: SHA-256 hash of the raw email file, stored at archival time.

thread.description: Other emails in the same thread, ordered by sentAt. Only present on single-email GET responses.

hits.description: Array of matching archived email objects, potentially with highlighted fields.

processingTimeMs.description: Meilisearch query processing time in milliseconds.

type.description: Whether this result is for the email itself or one of its attachments.

filename.description: Attachment filename. Only present when `type` is `attachment`.

isValid.description: True if the stored and computed hashes match.

storedHash.description: SHA-256 hash stored at archival time.

computedHash.description: SHA-256 hash computed during this verification run.

error.description: Shorthand copy of `failedReason` for easier access.

totalStorageUsed.description: Total storage used by all archived emails in bytes.

failedIngestionsLast7Days.description: Number of ingestion sources in error state updated in the last 7 days.

IngestionSourceStats.description: Summary of an ingestion source including its storage usage.

storageUsed.description: Total bytes stored for emails from this ingestion source.

RecentSync.description: Summary of a recent sync session.

IndexedInsights.description: Insights derived from the search index.

get.description: Returns the profile of the currently authenticated user.

patch.description: Updates the email, first name, or last name of the currently authenticated user. Disabled in demo mode.

post.description: Uploads a file (PST, EML, MBOX, or other) to temporary storage for subsequent use in an ingestion source. Returns the storage path, which should be passed as `uploadedFilePath` when creating a file-based ingestion source.

200.description: File uploaded successfully. Returns the storage path.

filePath.description: The storage path of the uploaded file. Use this as `uploadedFilePath` when creating a file-based ingestion source.

get.description: Downloads a file from the configured storage backend (local filesystem or S3-compatible). The path is sanitized to prevent directory traversal attacks.

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: The relative storage path of the file to download.

200.description: The file content as a binary stream. The `Content-Disposition` header is set to trigger a browser download.

400.description: File path is required or invalid.

get.description: Returns non-sensitive system settings such as language, timezone, and feature flags. This endpoint is public, no authentication required. Sensitive settings are never exposed.
Performs a full-text search across indexed archived emails using Meilisearch.

parameters.name: matchingStrategy
parameters.description: Meilisearch matching strategy. `last` returns results containing at least one keyword; `all` requires all keywords; `frequency` sorts by keyword frequency.

get.description: Returns all BullMQ job queues and their current job counts broken down by status.
Returns a paginated list of jobs within a specific queue, filtered by status.

parameters.name: queueName
parameters.description: The name of the queue (e.g. `ingestion` or `indexing`).

200.description: Detailed view of the queue including paginated jobs.

post.description: Creates a new ingestion source and validates the connection. Returns the created source without credentials.

400.description: Invalid input or connection test failed.

get.description: Returns all ingestion sources accessible to the authenticated user. Credentials are excluded from the response.
Returns a single ingestion source by ID. Credentials are excluded.

put.description: Updates configuration for an existing ingestion source.

delete.description: Permanently deletes an ingestion source. Deletion must be enabled in system settings.

204.description: Ingestion source deleted. No content returned.

post.description: Enqueues an initial import job for the ingestion source. This imports all historical emails.

202.description: Initial import job accepted and queued.

post.description: Sets the ingestion source status to `paused`, stopping continuous sync.

200.description: Ingestion source paused. Returns the updated source.

post.description: Triggers an out-of-schedule continuous sync for the ingestion source.

202.description: Force sync job accepted and queued.

post.description: Detaches a child source from its merge group, making it a standalone root source.

200.description: Source unmerged. Returns the updated source.

400.description: Source is not merged into another source.

get.description: Returns high-level statistics including total archived emails, total storage used, and failed ingestions in the last 7 days.
Returns time-series data of email ingestion counts for the last 30 days.

200.description: Ingestion history wrapped in a `history` array.

get.description: Returns a summary list of ingestion sources with their storage usage.
Returns the most recent sync sessions across all ingestion sources.
Returns top-sender statistics from the search index.

get.summary: List archived emails for an ingestion source
get.description: Returns a paginated list of archived emails belonging to the specified ingestion source.

parameters.name: ingestionSourceId
parameters.description: The ID of the ingestion source to retrieve emails for.

get.description: Retrieves the full details of a single archived email by ID, including attachments and thread.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the archived email.

delete.description: Permanently deletes an archived email by ID. Deletion must be enabled in system settings and the email must not be on legal hold.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the archived email to delete.

204.description: Email deleted successfully. No content returned.

400.description: Deletion is disabled in system settings, or the email is blocked by a retention policy / legal hold.

get.summary: List / search archived emails (FTS5 full-text search with filters)

parameters.name: ingestionSourceId
parameters.description: Filter to a source (merge group expanded)

get.summary: Facet values (senders, tags) for filter dropdowns
Sanitized HTML preview of an email (cid images inlined, remote assets rewritten to archived copies)
List an email's archived remote-content assets
Serve an archived remote asset (image) from storage

post.summary: Queue remote-content archiving for one email
Add / remove tags on a set of emails
Delete a set of emails (per-email results reported)

get.summary: List exact-duplicate groups (message-id / content hash / attachment set / headers)

post.summary: Approve exact-duplicate groups: keep the keeper, delete the copies
Approve fuzzy groups: keep keepers, delete duplicates

get.summary: Email → display-name map used for sender name resolution

post.summary: Import contacts from CSV or vCard content

get.summary: Emails whose remote content failed or partially archived
Legacy commit-based update check against the GitHub repo

post.summary: Wipe and rebuild the full-text index from the archive
